ip-auth-001.description: IAuthService interface with AuthUser, AuthSession, AuthCredentials types
ip-auth-001.rationale: Service interface pattern - defines contract for auth providers

ip-auth-002.rationale: Concrete provider for Supabase email/password auth

ip-auth-003.description: MockAuthService for testing without network calls
ip-auth-003.rationale: Mock pattern - enables unit testing without Supabase

ip-auth-004.description: Extend IEnvironment with optional services.auth slot
ip-auth-004.rationale: Environment extension pattern - DI for auth service

ip-auth-005.description: Auth domain store with ArkType scope and enhancement hooks
ip-auth-005.rationale: Domain store pattern - createStoreFromScope with enhanceModels, enhanceCollections, enhanceRootStore

ip-auth-007.description: AuthProvider and useAuth hook for React integration
ip-auth-007.rationale: React context pattern - provides auth store to component tree

ip-auth-008.description: Proof-of-work page demonstrating auth flows with real Supabase
ip-auth-008.rationale: Demo page showing signup, login, logout with real credentials
